name: First Time Seen Remote Named Pipe
description: Detects the first-time use of a remote named pipe, which can indicate lateral movement or remote execution. Excludes common legitimate named pipes.

prompts.prompt: A remote named pipe, not previously observed, has been detected. This is a potential indicator of lateral movement or remote code execution. Event Details: **Timestamp** {Timestamp}, **Event ID** {EventID}, **User** {User}, **Computer Name** {ComputerName}, **Share Name** {ShareName}, **Relative Target Name** {RelativeTargetName}, **Access Mask** {AccessMask}. Investigate this activity to determine if it's legitimate new behavior or malicious lateral movement.

parameters.name: EventID
parameters.description: The Event ID for a network share access (e.g., 5145).

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user account accessing the named pipe remotely.

parameters.name: ComputerName
parameters.description: The name of the computer where the named pipe access occurred.

parameters.name: ShareName
parameters.description: The name of the share involved in the access (e.g., 'IPC$').

parameters.name: RelativeTargetName
parameters.description: The specific named pipe being accessed.

parameters.name: AccessMask
parameters.description: The hexadecimal access mask indicating the type of access.
